lessons.name: Unit 12: Career Choices
lessons.description: Learn about career choices with adverb clauses of concession, result, and reason.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Careers: doctor, teacher, engineer, lawyer, nurse, pilot, chef, artist, musician, scientist, programmer, designer, accountant, manager

Skills: communication, teamwork, leadership, problem-solving, creativity, critical thinking, time management, organization

Education: degree, diploma, certificate, qualification, training, course, major, minor, graduate, undergraduate

Work: salary, wage, income, benefit, promotion, career path, job opportunity, work experience, internship

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about careers, skills, education, and work.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Adverb Clauses of Concession, Result, and Reason (Mệnh đề trạng từ chỉ sự nhượng bộ, kết quả và lý do)

A. Mệnh đề chỉ sự nhượng bộ (Concession):

  • although / though / even though: mặc dù
  • Ex: Although he is young, he is very talented.
  • Ex: She passed the exam even though she didn't study much.
  • despite / in spite of + N/V-ing: mặc dù
  • Ex: Despite the rain, we went out.
  • Ex: In spite of being tired, she continued working.

B. Mệnh đề chỉ kết quả (Result):

  • so...that: quá...đến nỗi
  • Ex: He is so smart that he can solve any problem.
  • such...that: quá...đến nỗi
  • Ex: It was such a difficult test that no one passed.
  • so + adj/adv + that
  • such + (a/an) + adj + N + that

C. Mệnh đề chỉ lý do (Reason):

  • because / since / as: bởi vì
  • Ex: I chose this career because I love helping people.
  • Ex: Since he is talented, he got the job.
  • Ex: As she studied hard, she passed the exam.
  • because of / due to + N/V-ing: bởi vì
  • Ex: I was late because of the traffic.
  • Ex: Due to his hard work, he succeeded.

D. So sánh:

  • although + clause vs despite + N/V-ing
  • Ex: Although it rained, we went out.
  • Ex: Despite the rain, we went out.
  • because + clause vs because of + N/V-ing
  • Ex: I was late because the traffic was heavy.
  • Ex: I was late because of the heavy traffic.

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Concession - Although vs Despite
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • although + clause
  • despite + N/V-ing

examples.question: ______ he is young, he is very talented.
examples.solution: Although he is young, he is very talented.

examples.question: ______ being tired, she continued working.
examples.solution: Despite / In spite of being tired, she continued working.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Result - So...that vs Such...that
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • so + adj/adv + that
  • such + (a/an) + adj + N + that

examples.question: He is ______ smart ______ he can solve any problem.
examples.solution: He is so smart that he can solve any problem.

examples.question: It was ______ a difficult test ______ no one passed.
examples.solution: It was such a difficult test that no one passed.

examples.question: She works ______ hard ______ she always succeeds.
examples.solution: She works so hard that she always succeeds.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Reason - Because vs Because of
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • because + clause
  • because of + N/V-ing

examples.question: I chose this career ______ I love helping people.
examples.solution: I chose this career because I love helping people.

examples.question: I was late ______ the traffic.
examples.solution: I was late because of the traffic.

examples.question: ______ his hard work, he succeeded.
examples.solution: Because of / Due to his hard work, he succeeded.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Chuyển đổi cấu trúc
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • although + clause ↔ despite + N/V-ing
  • because + clause ↔ because of + N/V-ing

examples.question: Although it rained, we went out. → ______ the rain, we went out.
examples.solution: Despite / In spite of the rain, we went out.

examples.question: Because the traffic was heavy, I was late. → ______ the heavy traffic, I was late.
examples.solution: Because of / Due to the heavy traffic, I was late.
examples.explanation: Chuyển: because + clause → because of + N

examples.question: Despite being tired, she worked. → ______ she was tired, she worked.
examples.solution: Although / Though / Even though she was tired, she worked.

exercises.question: ______ he is young, he is very talented.
______ the rain, we went out.
He is ______ smart that he can solve any problem.
It was ______ a difficult test that no one passed.
I chose this career ______ I love helping people.
I was late ______ the traffic.
______ being tired, she continued working.
______ he studied hard, he passed the exam.
She works ______ hard that she always succeeds.
______ his hard work, he succeeded.
Which show concession (nhượng bộ)? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Nhượng bộ: although, despite. because (lý do), so (kết quả)

exercises.question: Which are followed by a clause? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Theo sau bởi clause: although, because. despite, because of + N/V-ing

exercises.question: Which sentences are correct? (Select all that apply)
options: Although it rained, we went out.
Despite the rain, we went out.
Because of it rained, we stayed home.
He is so smart that he can solve problems.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: although + clause, despite + N, so...that. Sai: because of + clause (phải là 'because')

exercises.question: Fill in: ______ he is young, he is very talented.
Fill in: He is ______ smart ______ he can solve any problem.
Fill in: I was late ______ the traffic.
Transform: Although it rained, we went out. → ______ the rain, we went out.
Rearrange: Although / he / is / young / , / he / is / talented / very / . / Despite / rain / the / , / went / we / out / .
exercises.sample_answer: Although he is young, he is very talented. Despite the rain, we went out.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: although + clause; despite + N

exercises.question: Transform: Although it rained, we went out. → Despite ______.
exercises.sample_answer: Despite the rain, we went out.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: although + clause → despite + N

exercises.question: Transform: Because the traffic was heavy, I was late. → Because of ______.
exercises.sample_answer: Because of the heavy traffic, I was late.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: because + clause → because of + N

exercises.question: Rearrange: so / He / is / smart / that / can / he / solve / problem / any / . / such / It / was / difficult / a / test / that / one / no / passed / .
exercises.sample_answer: He is so smart that he can solve any problem. It was such a difficult test that no one passed.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: so + adj + that; such + a + adj + N + that

exercises.question: Combine all: Although he is young, he is talented. He works so hard that he succeeds. He chose this career because he loves it. (Keep all three sentences)
exercises.sample_answer: Although he is young, he is talented. He works so hard that he succeeds. He chose this career because he loves it.
